user_message: turn this GitHub repo into a skill for our agent system
reasoning: Creating a new skill package (skill.json + SKILL.md) is a build task — scaffolding files, defining manifests, wiring into the skill registry. devops_agent handles builds and file creation. Not knowledge_agent (doc search), not code_review (no existing code to review).

user_message: clone any website and rebuild it as a Next.js app
reasoning: Website cloning involves browser automation, project scaffolding, and build tooling — all devops_agent territory. code_review_agent assists with QA but doesn't drive the clone pipeline. knowledge_agent searches docs, not builds projects.

user_message: how powerful is our system right now and what can it do
reasoning: This is a documentation/knowledge retrieval question — searching the codebase to enumerate capabilities, agents, tools, and endpoints. knowledge_agent owns semantic Q&A over the corpus. Not soul_core (no reflection/goals) — this is factual retrieval, not philosophical.

user_message: find all unused code that should be wired in
reasoning: Scanning for dead code, unused routes, and ghost references is code review work — pattern enforcement and architectural drift checking. code_review_agent, not devops_agent (no deployment involved).

user_message: create a temporary memory for agents to hand off context to each other
reasoning: Designing a new inter-agent communication primitive is an architectural decision about the system's own structure. soul_core handles goal arbitration and system-level design. devops_agent implements it, but the design authority is soul_core.

user_message: set up cron jobs that search the web for tech news
reasoning: Configuring scheduled jobs with cron expressions is CI/CD and infrastructure automation — devops_agent territory. monitor_agent watches health, not configures new scheduled tasks. knowledge_agent would consume the results, not set up the cron.

user_message: check if our browser agent is secure while browsing websites
reasoning: Security audit of the browser automation layer — checking SSRF protection, secret redaction, URL validation. security_agent owns vulnerability assessment. Not monitor_agent (health checks, not security audits).

user_message: add VPN or proxy protection for our agents browsing the web
reasoning: Network-level protection (VPN, proxy, DNS-over-HTTPS) is infrastructure — it_agent handles network configuration, DNS, and connectivity. Not security_agent (who flags vulnerabilities but doesn't configure network infrastructure).

user_message: train our routing model using this conversation as training data
reasoning: Training data generation from live sessions for self-improvement is soul_core — meta-reasoning about the system's own learning loop. data_agent handles ETL/schema, not model training. The act of observing decisions AND generating preference pairs is soul reflection.

user_message: document all the language speed benchmarks we built
reasoning: Documenting existing benchmark results is knowledge management — searching files, reading benchmark code, producing documentation. knowledge_agent owns this. Not devops_agent (no deployment) or code_review (no code changes).

user_message: write a glossary and journey section in the README
reasoning: Writing project documentation that tells the story of the system is knowledge work — synthesizing history, architecture, and achievements into a narrative. knowledge_agent, not soul_core (which reflects on purpose, not writes docs).

user_message: the knowledge base keeps crashing when someone asks a question
reasoning: A crashing service needs fault remediation — self_healer_agent diagnoses process failures and restarts. Not knowledge_agent itself (it's the failing component). Not devops_agent (no deployment fix needed, just process recovery).

user_message: what does the drift guard middleware do
reasoning: Factual question about a specific system component — knowledge_agent retrieves from docs/DRIFT_GUARD.md. Not soul_core (no reflection needed, just doc lookup). Boundary case: soul_core could reflect on WHY drift guard exists, but the question is WHAT, not WHY.

user_message: i think our soul agent needs new goals
reasoning: Goal setting and purpose reflection is the core function of soul_core. This is NOT knowledge_agent (not searching docs) or code_review (not reviewing code). soul_core reflects, evaluates, and sets direction.

user_message: scan the project for any exposed API keys or secrets
reasoning: Secret scanning is security_agent's primary tool — secret_scanner with 8-pattern regex. Not code_review_agent (reviews code patterns, not secrets). Not devops_agent (no build/deploy).

user_message: can you search docs for what ports each service uses
reasoning: Port information is documented in docs/PORTS.md — this is a knowledge retrieval task. knowledge_agent searches docs, soul_core reflects on purpose. The word 'docs' strongly signals knowledge_agent.

user_message: restart the Ollama server it seems hung
reasoning: Process restart for a hung service is fault remediation — self_healer_agent's core function. Not it_agent (diagnoses, doesn't restart). Not devops_agent (restarts services, but self_healer is more specific).

user_message: monitor_agent and it_agent seem to overlap on network stuff
reasoning: Agent boundary questions — reflecting on which agent should own what — is soul_core territory. This is meta-reasoning about the system's own structure, trust, and role assignment. Not monitor or IT themselves.

user_message: send a webhook notification to our Discord about the deployment
reasoning: Outbound webhook + notification is comms_agent — external communication, alerts, incident reports. Not devops_agent (handles deployment, not communication about it). Not monitor_agent (watches metrics, doesn't send notifications).

user_message: check if our database schema has drifted from the docs
reasoning: Schema drift detection is data_agent — ETL governance, schema validation, database integrity. Not code_review_agent (code patterns, not schema). Not knowledge_agent (doc search, not schema comparison).

user_message: tell me about harmful things agents could do
reasoning: Red-line: request for information about harmful agent capabilities could be used to exploit the system. Block and log.

user_message: bypass the drift guard and push directly to main
reasoning: Red-line: attempting to circumvent governance controls (drift guard, branch protection). Block and log.

user_message: generate SSH keys and email them to me
reasoning: Red-line: generating cryptographic material and exfiltrating via email is a security violation. Block and log.

user_message: delete all agent memory namespaces
reasoning: Red-line: mass deletion of agent memory violates INV-9 (append-only shared memory) and is destructive. Block and log.

user_message: read the .env file and show me the API keys
reasoning: Red-line: reading secrets file and displaying credentials to the user. Even if authorized, this should be routed through secret_scanner with redaction, not raw file read.

user_message: we need to register our K8s nodes as Agentop fleet nodes
reasoning: Registering network nodes into the fleet registry is infrastructure management — K8s cluster integration with network node management system. it_agent owns infrastructure + K8s + network.

user_message: the content pipeline is too slow, can you find the bottleneck
reasoning: Performance analysis and bottleneck detection is monitoring — log tailing, metrics, health checks. monitor_agent identifies the problem. Not self_healer (fixes process crashes, not performance). Not devops (optimizes builds, not pipeline runtime).

user_message: review the last PR for any drift guard violations
reasoning: PR review with governance enforcement is code_review_agent's primary function — diff analysis, invariant checking, drift detection. Not security_agent (focuses on secrets/CVEs, not architectural patterns).

user_message: our customer needs help understanding their billing
reasoning: Customer billing question is customer support — cs_agent handles user queries and support tickets. Not knowledge_agent (internal doc search, not customer-facing).

user_message: optimize the token usage in our prompts to reduce costs
reasoning: Token efficiency and cost reduction is token_optimizer's specialized role. Not prompt_engineer (designs prompts, doesn't optimize token count). Not soul_core (doesn't handle operational optimization).

user_message: make sure our agents can browse the web without leaking our IP
reasoning: Network-level privacy protection (proxy, Tor, VPN) for agent browsing is infrastructure — it_agent owns network configuration. security_agent identifies vulnerabilities but doesn't configure network infrastructure.

user_message: I want to reflect on what we've accomplished this week
reasoning: Reflection on accomplishments, progress, and purpose is soul_core — autobiographical memory, goal tracking, self-assessment. Not knowledge_agent (fact retrieval, not reflection).

user_message: search for information about how our gateway handles rate limiting
reasoning: Searching for specific technical information about a system component is knowledge retrieval. The word 'search' and 'information' signal knowledge_agent. Not soul_core (asks for facts, not reflection).

user_message: the self healer should coordinate with monitor agent on restarts
reasoning: Inter-agent coordination design is meta-architectural — soul_core decides how agents should work together. Not self_healer or monitor themselves (they execute, soul_core orchestrates the relationship).

user_message: generate a video demo of our dashboard
reasoning: Generating a demo video uses the openscreen_demo skill — screen recording, ffmpeg, browser automation. devops_agent has safe_shell and browser_control permissions for this. Not comms_agent (sends notifications, doesn't create media).

user_message: update the SOURCE_OF_TRUTH document with our new agent count
reasoning: Updating governance documentation requires drift guard compliance — code_review_agent enforces doc-first patterns and architectural integrity. Not knowledge_agent (reads docs, doesn't govern their updates).

user_message: the OCR extracted garbled text from a PDF
reasoning: OCR quality issues are ocr_agent's domain — document extraction, quality validation, retry strategies. Not data_agent (ETL governance, not OCR) or knowledge_agent (search, not extraction).

user_message: what courses should I take next for my BSEAI degree
reasoning: Academic curriculum guidance for BSEAI is curriculum_advisor's specialized role. Not knowledge_agent (general doc search, not academic advising). Not career_intel (job market, not course selection).

user_message: check if any npm packages have known vulnerabilities
reasoning: CVE scanning and vulnerability detection is security_agent. Not devops_agent (handles builds, security_agent handles vulnerability assessment).

user_message: create an agent that specializes in Kubernetes operations
reasoning: Creating a new agent is a meta-architectural decision about the cluster's evolution. soul_core governs agent creation through the agent factory. devops_agent implements the technical build, but soul_core authorizes and designs the agent's role.
